title: Be an Angel Day: Spread Your Wings!
story: Every August 22, people celebrate Be an Angel Day by doing kind acts for others without expecting anything back. story: Swords clashed and cannons roared as Prince Eugene of Savoy led his army into battle. On August 22, 1707, he broke the Great Siege of Turin, saving northern Italy from French control.
